positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest scene featuring elegant silhouettes of stylized owls, deer, and fox forms interwoven with astronomical elements like crescent moons, nebulae swirls, and constellation lines. The style must be a highly detailed, intricate linework etching combined with deep indigo and emerald green tones, reminiscent of Art Nouveau engraving but with modern pop-art color accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, designed as a single, scalable, continuous pattern suitable for apparel printing. Utilize high contrast, clean black outlines, and flat, rich color blocking. No photorealism. Intricate detail, symmetrical balance, graphic novel quality, engraved woodcut style.
